title: How to Beat AI in Your Dev Job Search
summary: AWS Developers video addresses how developers can stand out in job searches as AI screens resumes, emphasizing networking, personal branding, and open-source contributions. Argues junior developers remain valuable despite automation, using job evolution analogies and recommending hands-on learning paths.
writeup: This AWS Developers video covers how developers can differentiate themselves in job searches as AI systems screen resumes, focusing on networking, personal branding, and open-source contributions. It matters because automated resume screening reshapes how candidates get noticed, shifting weight toward signals beyond the resume itself. The key takeaways: junior developers retain value despite automation, job roles evolve rather than disappear, and hands-on learning paths along with visible open-source work help candidates stand out.
